---
title: "Posts: Notes and use cases"
listing:
  contents: posts
  categories: true
---

# Introduction

**A) Rarely, but it happens:**

>  On occasions I am asked to do similar things that I have already done before.

**B) Very frequently, it happens for sure:**

>  I forget how I did what I have already done before.

These two relevant facts in my life motivated me to create this blog. Of course, it is also a way to show that I can do some stuff and share my limited knowledge to others.   

- **Audience**: Sometimes I do tasks for

# Tags

There are three types of tags:

-  **1 Data Science tools** from [R for Data Science](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/) by Hadley Wickham & Garret Grolemund that defines these 5 type of tools in a Data Science Project.
    - Import
    - Tidy
    - Transform
    - Model
    - Communicate
  
  
![](/media/data_science_tools.png)


- **Languages** used dealing mainly with geospatial data.
  - PostGIS
  - R
  - Python

![](/media/language_log.png)

## Data Science

## ESRI
